title: ruta graveolens subsp. divaricata
intro: Ruta graveolens subsp. divaricata, also known as divaricated rue, is a subspecies of the rue plant, a perennial herb belonging to the family Rutaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which are derived from its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ruta graveolens subsp. divaricata include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and improve digestion, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and promote wound healing. Divaricated rue can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
